prompt: Square 1:1 editorial lifestyle photograph. A woman in dusty mauve athleisure pulling her hair into a ponytail before a morning run in a sunlit urban park, warm golden hour light. CAMERA-IN-MOTION blur — soft directional smear from a fast right-to-left lateral camera pan, slight Dutch tilt ~7° counter-clockwise, stronger blur intensity. Documentary photojournalism aesthetic, fine 35mm grain, subtle halation. No text, no logos.
